title: Judi Health rebrands PBM arm as Judi Rx, unveils Judi Care unit
summary: Judi Health is continuing on its rebranding journey, and announced on Wednesday that its pharmacy benefit management arm will now operate as Judi Rx.

title: Doctor pay to drop in 2027 under proposed Medicare pay rule
summary: Physician groups said the sweeping rule is a double-edged sword, given it includes an unwelcome fee cut but positive changes to Medicare’s value-based and quality payment programs.

title: Hospital M&A stays hot in Q2 as health systems position for the future
summary: There were 18 hospital transactions announced April through June, continuing a rebound from early 2025 that has seen more participation from mid-to-large independent systems eyeing future growth and sustainability, Kaufman Hall reports.

title: Hospital M&A sustains momentum in Q2: report
summary: Hospitals and health systems recorded 18 transactions in the second quarter after a lull in dealmaking early last year as providers partner up in a bid to bolster their finances.

title: HCA Healthcare now expects ACA exchange impacts to exceed $1B in 2026
summary: The country's largest for-profit health system released preliminary second-quarter results highlighting an increase in uninsured volumes. It now expects a $1 billion to $1.2 billion pre-tax hit across the full year due to payer mix shifts among exchange patients.

title: Digital health funding hits $7.4B in 2026 as AI investment reshapes the market

title: CVS Caremark reaches settlement with FTC over insulin suit
summary: Terms of the deal announced Tuesday are very similar to those the FTC reached with Express Scripts earlier this year, including requiring the PBM to stop preferring higher cost versions of drugs on standard formularies.

title: CMS proposes major Medicare reforms to shift physician pay, phase out MIPS and expand ACO participation
summary: The Trump administration is proposing sweeping changes to Medicare payment and value-based care programs it says will expand accountable care, modernize physician payment and help shift the healthcare system toward prevention instead of treatment.

title: HHS watchdog says it’s targeting Medicaid, Medicare Advantage fraud
summary: The HHS Office of Inspector General removed over 1,200 people and entities from federal programs between October and March as the Trump administration ratchets up oversight into healthcare fraud.

title: Startup Sonata launches preventive healthcare membership, linking clinical decisions with AI
summary: Membership includes unlimited, continuous care with licensed physicians, in-home blood testing, clinical AI and genome sequencing, according to the company.
